title: Mapping of heart tissue using Visium Spatial Gene Expression for FFPE
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"cf89f","text":"We describe a validated workflow for spatially mapping gene expression in formalin-fixed paraffin-embedded (FFPE) human heart tissue using the 10x Genomics Visium Spatial Gene Expression Reagent Kit for FFPE (CG000407, Rev D). Whole-transcriptome probe hybridization enables precise mRNA localization within intact cardiac tissue architecture, supporting studies of cardiac biology, fibrosis, ischemia, and cardiomyopathy. This protocol complies with SenNet Consortium data submission requirements.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"4eenn","text":"Tissue collection may only proceed with prior approval from the user’s Institutional Ethics Board (IEB) or an equivalent ethics committee.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Library QC & Sequencing %s %s Sequencing Configuration • Read 1: 28 cycles | Read 2S: 50 cycles | Index i7: 10 cycles | Index i5: 10 cycles • Platform: Illumina NovaSeq 6000, NextSeq 2000, or equivalent • Minimum depth: 25,000 readsper tissue-covered spot

Data Processing • Process FASTQs with Space Ranger (spaceranger count) using GRCh38 and the Visium FFPE probe set. • Confirm spatial barcode–image alignment via Loupe Browser or Space Ranger HTML summary. • Archive raw FASTQs and Space Ranger outputs (filtered_feature_bc_matrix/, spatial/, tissue_positions.csv).

Library Construction (CG000407 Rev D) Follow CG000407 precisely for all reagent volumes, incubation times, and thermocycler programs. 3.1 Probe Hybridization %s %s 3.2 Probe Ligation %s %s 3.3 Probe Release & Extension %s %s 3.4 PCRAmplification & Indexing %s %s

Deparaffinization, H&E, Imaging & Decrosslinking (per CG000409 Rev D) NOTE: Run all steps on a test slide first. Capture brightfield TIFF image before decrosslinking — required for Space Ranger alignment. %s %s
creator: Lorena Rosas
